sections.title: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property
sections.plain_language: If someone tricks you into giving them money or property by lying or hiding the truth, they can be imprisoned for up to 7 years.

sections.title: Punishment for criminal breach of trust
sections.plain_language: If you trust someone with your money or property (like a landlord with a deposit) and they use it for their own gain or refuse to return it dishonestly, they can be imprisoned for up to 5 years.
